Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Actual voltage is not open load voltage
Actual voltage is open load voltage

Data.Name: Delivery Data - Date of Verification Year
Delivery Data - Date of Verification Month
Delivery Data - Date of Verfication Day
Time Since Last Opening of Contactors
Requested Time to Achieve OCV State
Measurement Quality Of Last Guided Measurement
Sum of Energy from the beginning of battery life
Internal Resistance Correction Factor Part 2 Hex
Max. Number of Reprogramming Attempts - Counter 0

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

ReadData.Internal Resistance Correction Factor Part 2 Read

Request.Name: ReadData.Internal Resistance Correction Factor Part 1_Hex Read
ReadData.Battery Production Data R Hex Read
ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

DataItem.Name: Max. Number of Reprogramming Attempts - Counter 0

Request.Name: DataRead.Battery Production Data D HexDump Read
DataRead.Dump of Vedoc Relevant Information Read

DataItem.Name: Max. Number of Reprogramming Attempts - Counter 0

Request.Name: DataWrite.Battery Production Data D HexDump Write

Test.Description: System Voltage Low - circuit voltage below threshold
System Voltage Low - circuit voltage out of range
System Voltage High - circuit voltage above threshold
System Voltage High - circuit voltage out of range
Serial Communication Link - value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Serial Communication Link - missing message
Serial Communication Link - bus off
Serial Communication Link - erratic
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error - System Internal Failures
Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error - general memory failure
Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error - System Internal Failures
Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error - general memory failure
Control Module Processor - special memory failure
Control Module Processor - internal electronic failure
Control Module Performance - missing message
Fuel Pump Control Module "A" - missing message
Sensor Power Supply "A" Circuit Low - circuit short to ground or open
Sensor Power Supply "A" Circuit Low - circuit voltage below threshold
Sensor Power Supply "A" Circuit High - circuit voltage above threshold
Internal Control Module Non-Volatile Random Access Memory (NVRAM) Error - special memory failure
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" - circuit open
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" - circuit voltage below threshold
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" - circuit voltage above threshold
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" Performance - circuit open
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" Performance - signal erratic
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" Low - circuit short to ground
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "A" High - circuit short to battery
Battery Energy Control Module "A" Performance - circuit voltage below threshold
Battery Energy Control Module "A" Performance - circuit voltage above threshold
Drive Motor "A" Phase W Current - circuit / component protection time-out
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Over Temperature - over temperature
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Over Temperature - circuit / component protection time-out
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Over Temperature - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
High Voltage Fuse "A" - circuit open
High Voltage Fuse "A" - circuit current above threshold
High Voltage Fuse "A" - circuit / component protection time-out
Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit - signal compare failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit Range/Performance - signal plausibility failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit Low - circuit short to ground
Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit Low - circuit voltage out of range
Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit High - circuit short to battery
Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit High - circuit voltage out of range
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage System Isolation Fault - circuit resistance below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - System Internal Failures
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - watchdog / safety µC failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - supervision software failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - internal electronic failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - deactivated
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - actuator stuck
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - missing message
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - erratic
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - performance or incorrect operation
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Isolation Sensor Circuit - component internal failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Voltage Sense "A" Circuit Range/Performance - signal compare failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - System Internal Failures
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - general memory failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - special memory failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - data memory failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - incorrect component installed
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - ISO/SAE reserved
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - ISO/SAE reserved
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - bus off
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - unexpected operation
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - incorrect assembly
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - component internal failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - component or system over temperature
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit - ISO/SAE reserved
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit Range/Performance - unexpected operation
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit Low - circuit current out of range
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Current Sensor "A" Circuit High - circuit current out of range
Hybrid/EV Battery Positive Contactor Control Circuit Low - circuit voltage above threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Voltage Sense "B" Circuit Range/Performance - signal compare failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Voltage Sense "B" Circuit High - circuit voltage above threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - System Internal Failures
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - Component Failures
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - circuit open
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - internal electronic failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - incorrect component installed
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - ISO/SAE reserved
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - signal compare failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - signal plausibility failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - signal invalid
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - missing message
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - bus off
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit - erratic
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "A" Circuit Intermittent/Erratic - missing message
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Sense "B" Circuit Intermittent/Erratic - missing message
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit Low - circuit short to battery
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit High - circuit short to ground
Hybrid/EV Battery Charging Current High - circuit current above threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Charging Current High - circuit / component protection time-out
Hybrid/EV Battery Discharging Current High - circuit current above threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Temperature Sensor "B" Circuit Low - circuit short to battery
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Temperature Sensor "B" Circuit High - circuit short to ground
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage Low - circuit voltage below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage Low - circuit voltage out of range
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage Low - circuit / component protection time-out
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage Low - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage High - circuit voltage above threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage High - circuit voltage out of range
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage High - circuit / component protection time-out
Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Cell Voltage High - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Internal Control Module Hybrid/EV Battery Monitor Performance - circuit voltage below threshold
Internal Control Module Hybrid/EV Battery Monitor Performance - circuit voltage above threshold
Internal Control Module Hybrid/EV Battery Monitor Performance - internal electronic failure
Internal Control Module Hybrid/EV Battery Monitor Performance - component internal failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Internal Isolation Fault - circuit resistance below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Internal Isolation Fault - signal has too many transitions / events
Frequency counter ''Switching cycles of contactors'' of high-voltage battery module will soon reach its final value - actuator stuck
Frequency counter ''Switching cycles of contactors'' of high-voltage battery module will soon reach its final value - commanded position not reachable
Frequency counter ''Switching cycles of contactors'' of high-voltage battery module will soon reach its final value - signal above allowable range
The frequency counter ''Switching cycles of contactors'' of the high-voltage battery module has reached its final value - actuator stuck
The frequency counter ''Switching cycles of contactors'' of the high-voltage battery module has reached its final value - commanded position not reachable
The frequency counter ''Switching cycles of contactors'' of the high-voltage battery module has reached its final value - signal above allowable range
The battery discharge protection function of the high-voltage battery module is activated - circuit voltage below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage External Isolation Fault - circuit resistance below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage Internal Isolation Warning - circuit resistance below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage External Isolation Warning - circuit resistance below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage System Isolation Warning - circuit resistance below threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Interface Control Module "A" Performance - circuit short to ground
Hybrid/EV Battery Interface Control Module "A" Performance - circuit short to battery
Hybrid/EV Battery Interface Control Module "A" Performance - component or system over temperature
Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Supply Circuit/Open - circuit current above threshold
Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Supply Circuit/Open - internal electronic failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Supply Circuit/Open - signal compare failure
Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Supply Circuit Low - circuit short to ground
Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Supply Circuit High - circuit short to battery
Control Module Improper Shutdown Performance - watchdog / safety µC failure
Control Module Improper Shutdown Performance - missing message
Control Module Improper Shutdown Performance - performance or incorrect operation
Control Module Improper Shutdown Performance - no operation
Control Module Timer/Clock Performance - System Internal Failures
High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "B" - circuit open
